info.title: Spica Backend Engine API
info.description: Complete OpenAPI 3.1 specification for the Spica open-source backend development engine.

tags.name: User
tags.description: User CRUD, factor auth, passwordless login

post.summary: Complete two-factor authentication for identity login

get.summary: Get SAML login URL for a strategy

post.summary: Complete two-factor authentication for user login

get.summary: Get OAuth login URL for a strategy
Get an API key by ID

put.summary: Attach a policy to an API key

delete.summary: Detach a policy from an API key

get.summary: Verify a JWT token for identity
Get policy statements for the authenticated identity
Get profiler entries for identity queries
List identities with optional pagination and filter

200.description: Paginated identity list or plain array

get.summary: Get predefined default values for identities

put.summary: Attach a policy to an identity

delete.summary: Detach a policy from an identity

post.summary: Start two-factor authentication setup for an identity
Complete two-factor authentication setup for an identity

delete.summary: Remove authentication factor from an identity

get.summary: Verify a JWT token for user
Get profiler entries for user queries
List users with optional pagination and filter

200.description: Paginated user list or plain array

get.summary: Get available authentication factor schemas for users

put.summary: Attach a policy to a user

delete.summary: Detach a policy from a user

post.summary: Start two-factor authentication setup for a user
Complete two-factor authentication setup for a user

delete.summary: Remove authentication factor from a user

post.summary: Start provider verification for a user
Verify a provider for a user
Verify forgot password code and set new password

get.summary: Get predefined default values for bucket schema fields
Get a bucket schema by ID

patch.summary: Partially update a bucket schema (category, order)

delete.summary: Delete a bucket schema and its data

get.summary: List bucket documents with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Insert a new document into a bucket

get.summary: Get profiler entries for bucket data queries
List history entries for a bucket document
Revert a bucket document to a previous history state

delete.summary: Clear all history entries for a bucket

get.summary: Get available enqueuers, runtimes, and timeout info

delete.summary: Remove a dependency from a function

put.summary: Inject an environment variable into a function

delete.summary: Eject an environment variable from a function

put.summary: Inject a secret into a function

delete.summary: Eject a secret from a function

get.summary: List function execution logs with filters

delete.summary: Clear logs for a specific function

get.summary: List available database collections for webhooks
Get configuration for a specific module

200.description: Paginated storage objects or plain array

post.summary: Upload one or more storage objects

delete.summary: Delete multiple storage objects by IDs

put.summary: Upload a chunk for a resumable upload session

delete.summary: Delete a storage object by ID or name

post.summary: Export selected assets as a zip archive

200.description: Paginated env vars or plain array

get.summary: Get an environment variable by ID
Get status for a specific module

put.summary: Approve or reject a sync record

IdentityAuth.description: Pass a JWT token prefixed with IDENTITY in the Authorization header: Authorization: IDENTITY <token>

ApiKeyAuth.description: Pass an API key prefixed with APIKEY in the Authorization header: Authorization: APIKEY <key>

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of items to return

Sort.name: sort
Sort.description: Sort fields. Keys are field names, values are 1 (asc) or -1 (desc)

Paginate.name: paginate
Paginate.description: When true, return paginated {meta, data} response

options.description: Strategy-specific options. SAML: {sp, ip}. OAuth: {code, access_token, identifier, password, idp}.
